title: HEALTH OPPORTUNITY PROSPERITY AND EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY ALBANY HEALTH OPPORTUNITY PROSPERITY AND EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support mentoring, certified recovery mentoring, assistance with applications for birth certificates, Social Security, and social services. Can provide basic needs navigation. 635 SW 3rd Street Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 619-4584 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 619-4584 Darius Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance Life Skills Education Mentoring Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RAPID REHOUSING SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY ALBANY
